env HOME=$WORK/home
mkdir $WORK/home
sin-code todo --db $WORK/todo.db init
sin-code todo --db $WORK/todo.db add --title 'A' --priority P0
sin-code todo --db $WORK/todo.db add --title 'B' --priority P1
sin-code todo --db $WORK/todo.db add --title 'C' --priority P2
sin-code todo --db $WORK/todo.db stats
stdout 'Total: 3'
stdout 'P0'
stdout 'P1'
stdout 'P2'
